home.title: Flower Supply Chain
home.subtitle: New Experience
home.desc: Connecting origin to market with intelligent matchmaking. Wholesale auction, flower reverse auction, map shopping, garden planting — your one-stop flower supply chain platform.

reverse.title: Flower Reverse Auction
reverse.desc: Lily flowers get cheaper over time

map.title: Map Shopping
map.desc: Buy flowers nearby with one click

greenCert.subtitle: Green Certification · Carbon Credit
greenCert.title: Tree Green Certification & Carbon Credits
greenCert.desc: Every certified tree is traceable, measurable, and tradable. Building a trusted green value chain from planting to carbon sink.

trace.title: Tree Traceability
trace.desc: Each certified tree has a unique traceability ID. Full lifecycle records from seedling to mature tree.

bind.title: Person-Tree Binding
bind.desc: Certified trees are bound to real-name planters/caretakers. Regular photo check-ins ensure tree survival and care quality.

measure.title: Carbon Measurement
measure.desc: Calculate carbon sink based on species, DBH, age using IPCC standards. Quarterly updates, transparent and auditable.

trade.title: Carbon Coin Trading
trade.desc: Carbon sink automatically converts to Carbon Coins (CC) for shopping discounts, point redemption, or free market trading.

submit.title: Submit
submit.desc: Upload tree info + ID verification + GPS location

review.title: Approved
review.desc: Platform reviews and issues green certification label

bind.title: Binding
bind.desc: Planter binds to tree, carbon measurement begins

checkin.title: Check-in
checkin.desc: Quarterly photo with plant + growth data upload

issue.title: Coin Issued
issue.desc: Carbon coins auto-issued based on carbon sink

use.title: Trade & Redeem
use.desc: Use coins for shopping discounts or market trading

successStories.subtitle: Success Stories
successStories.title: Garden & Landscape · Success Stories
successStories.desc: From villa courtyards to balcony gardens, every project delivered with care

items.title: Beijing Villa Courtyard
items.desc: 25 white pines + 80 roses, 30 days from bare ground to garden

items.title: Langfang Community Greening
items.desc: 300 mixed trees & shrubs, quarterly maintenance included

items.title: Baoding Cemetery Landscape
items.desc: Evergreen trees + seasonal flowers for year-round beauty

items.title: Fengtai Balcony Garden
items.desc: 2-meter space transformed into a mini garden

items.name: Mr. Zhang
items.text: 95%+ survival rate for white pines! Still thriving after a year — way better than flower markets!

items.name: Ms. Li
items.text: Cold chain for wedding flowers — lilies were so full, every guest asked where we ordered.

items.name: Manager Wang
items.text: One-click community greening with delivery and planting. Saved a fortune on property fees.

items.name: Boss Zhao
items.text: Stable weekly supply of 2000 pots. Consistent quality, customers keep coming back.

items.name: Ms. Liu
items.text: Professional year-round green plan for the cemetery. Families are very satisfied.

items.name: Mr. Chen
items.text: Turned my 2m balcony into a garden — wife says it's the best gift this year!

cn.name: 中国
cn.badge: 中国エリア · 中国庭園サプライチェーン
cn.title: 植物コレクター
cn.subtitle: 新しいサプライチェーン体験
cn.desc: 中国庭園と北方花木市場を軸に、産地・事業者・庭づくりのシーンをつなぎます。苗木オークション、花の逆オークション、地図購入、ガーデン栽培をワンストップで。
cn.plantLine: おすすめ：牡丹、マキ、シロマツ、金木犀、バラ、中国盆栽

us.name: 米国
us.badge: 米国エリア · アメリカンガーデン供給網
us.title: 植物コレクター
us.subtitle: 新しいサプライチェーン体験
us.desc: アメリカの庭、ガーデンセンター、コミュニティ緑化向けに、産地直結、地図購入、安定した履行を提供します。
us.plantLine: おすすめ：アジサイ、ラベンダー、バラ、多肉植物、観賞用グラス、庭木

de.name: ドイツ
de.badge: ドイツエリア · 欧州フォレストガーデン供給網
de.title: 植物コレクター
de.subtitle: 新しいサプライチェーン体験
de.desc: 欧州庭園、森の景観、持続可能な園芸調達向けに、グリーン認証、炭素価値、産地追跡、厳格な履行を重視します。
de.plantLine: おすすめ：クレマチス、ヤグルマギク、ハーブ、球根花、トウヒ、ヨーロッパブナ

jp.name: 日本
jp.badge: 日本エリア · 和風庭園サプライチェーン
jp.title: 植物コレクター
jp.subtitle: 新しいサプライチェーン体験
jp.desc: 和風庭園、屋上緑化、精品園芸向けに、厳選産地、丁寧な履行、季節の花材供給を重視します。

fr.name: France
fr.title: 植物コレクター
fr.subtitle: A New Supply Chain Experience
fr.desc: For French gardens, estate landscapes, and urban floristry, highlighting romantic borders, terroir-driven sourcing, and premium horticulture fulfillment.
fr.plantLine: Recommended: lavender, iris, rose, plane tree, grapevine, French border plants

sa.name: Saudi Arabia
sa.badge: Saudi Arabia · Desert oasis supply chain
sa.title: 植物コレクター
sa.subtitle: A New Supply Chain Experience
sa.desc: For desert oases, drought-tolerant landscapes, and premium urban greening, focused on heat-tolerant plants, water efficiency, and reliable cross-region fulfillment.
sa.plantLine: Recommended: date palm, palm, bougainvillea, desert rose, olive, drought-tolerant herbs
